athletes.title: Dubai 2025 Asian Youth Para Games
athletes.summary: Para Armwrestling Debuts at Dubai 2025 Asian Youth Para Games The Para Armwrestling competition at the Asian Youth Para Games Dubai 2025 was held on 11 December 2025, marking a historic milestone for the sport. This event represents the first official inclusion of para armwrestling in the Asian Youth Para Games, organized in cooperation with […]

athletes.title: First Step Completed – Road to Brisbane 2032 Paralympics
athletes.summary: Para Armwrestling Meets IPC Worldwide Reach Requirement for Brisbane 2032 The World Armwrestling Federation (WAF) is pleased to confirm that Para Armwrestling has met the worldwide reach requirement for inclusion in the Brisbane 2032 Paralympic Games, following official confirmation from the International Paralympic Committee. competitions.title: India Ready for Worlds 2026
